summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Kids' Money (My Money) feature. Backend: 19/19 pytest cases passed (summary scoping, child self-forcing, admin override, balance math, validation, PUT/DELETE auth, /kids admin-only, multi-tenant isolation, adult self-scope). Frontend (Playwright on mobile viewport): child nav shows 'nav-my-money' (not 'nav-home-budget'); /home-budget redirects child to /my-money; child ledger renders with balance/income/payments/add buttons; adding income 20 then payment 8 yields balance 12 €; editing entry persists new amount/description and delete removes it from list; admin nav shows 'nav-home-budget'; admin /my-money shows 'my-money-admin-index' with kid row; admin drill-in lets admin add entries on the child's ledger (balance updated correctly to 42 € after our prior edit/delete + 50 gift); 'open-kids-money-btn' is present inside WallSettings dialog opened via 'wall-menu-btn'; Arabic and German translations on /my-money render localized labels with no raw 'myMoney.*' keys leaking.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 2514 lines — kids_money block adds another router section. Consider splitting routers into /app/backend/routers/kids_money.py for maintainability (>700 LoC guideline).
MyMoney.jsx is 549 lines — still under threshold but Add and Edit dialogs duplicate the same form structure; could be extracted into a shared TxFormDialog component.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (11/11 — admin_drill expected-balance constant in script was wrong; UI behavior verified visually via screenshot showing 42,00 € correctly = -8 + 50)

test_credentials: Created on the fly per test run: qa-mm-<ts>@example.com / Pass1234! ; member PINs parent=1234 child=4321 adult=9999.
seed_data_creation: Each test run registers a fresh family (prefix TEST_MM_*) with one admin parent, two kids, one adult. Backend pytest fixtures are module-scoped; no cleanup teardown but data is multi-tenant-isolated by family_id so it doesn't affect other tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_kids_money.py. Important gotcha: /auth/member/select returns the JWT under key 'member_token' (NOT 'access_token'). The Kids' Money endpoints require this member_token (account_token is rejected with 401 because it lacks mid/mrole/fadmin claims). Bot/WAF rejects raw urllib User-Agent during Playwright runs with 403 — prefer page.request.fetch which goes through the browser's network stack. Frontend storage keys: mfml_account_token, mfml_member_token, mfml_account, mfml_family, mfml_member, mfml_auth_ok='true', mfml_lang. WallSettings dialog opens via [data-testid='wall-menu-btn'] (not 'wall-settings-btn').
rca of the issue: N/A — all expected behaviors verified; no bug found.
